scripts.build:cli: turbo run build --filter=web && node scripts/copy-web-to-cli.mjs && turbo run build --filter=glyphsmith
scripts.export:icons: pnpm --filter glyphsmith run build && node apps/cli/dist/index.js export --example glyphsmith --out apps/web/static/icons --clean
scripts.publish:check: pnpm run check-types && pnpm --filter web run check && pnpm run pack:cli
